Diff contains only execution evidence (manifest.json, result.json) — no schema changes, no status implementation, no self-mutation guard, and no tests. None of the four acceptance criteria can be evaluated as implemented from this diff.

post-merge review: BLOCK (flagged for human)
Diff contains only execution evidence (manifest.json, result.json) — no schema changes, no status implementation, no self-mutation guard, and no tests. None of the four acceptance criteria can be evaluated as implemented from this diff.

Bead: ddx-ad77c46d — operator-prompts: schema/template/status-model

Status: no code changes — all four acceptance criteria are already
satisfied in the base revision (2f6141356b6b3a41c0a82e59fa1b87f6f8fcee02).

Evidence (file:line):

AC1 — Bead schema accepts operator-prompt
  - cli/internal/bead/schema/bead-record.schema.json:25-37
    `status` enum includes "proposed" and "cancelled"; `issue_type` is an
    open string (no enum), accepting "operator-prompt".
  - cli/internal/bead/types.go:82  IssueTypeOperatorPrompt = "operator-prompt"
  - Test: TestSchemaAcceptsOperatorPromptIssueType
    (cli/internal/bead/operator_prompt_test.go:15) — PASS.

AC2 — proposed status implemented
  - cli/internal/bead/types.go:72  StatusProposed = "proposed"
  - cli/internal/bead/types.go:75  StatusCancelled = "cancelled"
  - cli/internal/bead/types.go:118  IsValidStatusTransition allows
    proposed→open and proposed→cancelled, denies all other exits.
  - cli/internal/bead/store.go:1721 validator accepts StatusProposed,
    StatusCancelled.
  - Test: TestStatusTransitionsForProposed
    (cli/internal/bead/operator_prompt_test.go:64) — PASS.

AC3 — Self-mutation rejected at bead-create time
  - cli/internal/bead/types.go:143  OperatorPromptMutationGuard
  - cli/internal/bead/store.go:462  guard wired into Store.Create using
    DDX_ACTOR_ISSUE_TYPE env (set by execute-bead harness).
  - Tests: TestOperatorPromptMutationGuardMatrix and
    TestStoreCreateRejectsOperatorPromptSelfMutation
    (cli/internal/bead/operator_prompt_test.go:93, 124) — PASS.

AC4 — Tests cover all three
  - cli/internal/bead/operator_prompt_test.go (8 test functions /
    19 subtests) — all PASS via `go test ./internal/bead/`.

Library template for operator-prompt artifacts (notes item):
  - library/artifacts/operator-prompt/template.md exists, documenting
    the operator-prompt schema, approval flow, no-self-mutation rule,
    and auto-AC stub.

Verification command run in this attempt:
  cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/   → ok (4.4s, 0 failures)

Why no commit this attempt:
  The previous attempts (commits 81e6d338 and a8c43888) merged the
  schema, status model, mutation guard, store wiring, library template,
  and tests into the base. The bead's REVIEW:BLOCK note from a prior
  iteration ("Diff contains only execution evidence") does not reflect
  the current state of the repository at base-rev
  2f6141356b6b3a41c0a82e59fa1b87f6f8fcee02 — the implementation is
  present and the tests are green. There is no remaining engineering
  work to perform for this bead's AC.
